commands.purpose: Locate the buggy permission conditional, prompt construction points, and stale dangerous-flag assumptions before editing.
commands.observed: Found bin/cld default branch still adding --dangerously-skip-permissions and tests/test_cld_single_bead_contract.py expecting that old -br default.

commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_launcher_permission_modes.py tests/test_cld_single_bead_contract.py
commands.purpose: TDD red gate for the new launcher permission-mode regressions and stale -br default assertion.
commands.observed: Expected failure before production change: 9 failed, 23 passed. Default paths still contained --dangerously-skip-permissions and explicit --skip-perms emitted no warning.

commands.command: git add tests/test_launcher_permission_modes.py tests/test_cld_single_bead_contract.py && git commit -m "test(CL-w3q3): red launcher permission-mode regressions"
commands.purpose: Commit the red test changes alone.

commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_launcher_permission_modes.py tests/test_cld_single_bead_contract.py
commands.purpose: TDD green gate after updating bin/cld.
commands.observed: Both scoped test files passed: 32 passed.

commands.command: git add bin/cld && git commit -m "fix(CL-w3q3): green use safe cld permission default"
commands.purpose: Commit the production launcher fix separately from the red tests.
Verify remaining dangerous-flag references are either explicit opt-in coverage, warning/help text, or safe-default assertions.
commands.observed: No stale default assertion remains; tests now assert --permission-mode auto for default -br and dangerous flag only for explicit opt-in.

commands.purpose: Capture the final implementation commit order.
commands.observed: Top commits were 3b398e4 fix(CL-w3q3): green use safe cld permission default and d933366 test(CL-w3q3): red launcher permission-mode regressions.
